title: calcearia pilifera
intro: Calcearia pilifera, also known as Cystopteris pilifera, is a type of fern plant native to North America and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. Calcearia pilifera can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
